paper_title: Sparse Multi-Modal Transformer with Masking for Alzheimer's Disease Classification

main_challenges: Limited size of high-quality medical datasets, particularly for early-stage AD and MCI.
Heterogeneous and frequently incomplete clinical data, with common missing modalities.

proposed_method.name: Sparse Multi-Modal Transformer with Masking
proposed_method.description: A hybrid fusion framework designed for efficient and robust AD classification, particularly in low-resource settings.

key_innovations.name: Cluster-based sparse attention mechanism
key_innovations.description: Reduces computational cost by limiting attention computation within token clusters.

key_innovations.name: Modality-wise masking strategy
key_innovations.description: Improves generalization by simulating missing modalities during training.

title: Sparse Multi-Modal Transformer with Masking for Alzheimer's Disease Classification
